title: Test oracle discipline: no test uses code-under-test as its own oracle
description: All tests across tx_builder, fees, db, payment, memo, sync_guard use independent oracles: known ZIP-32/ZIP-317 vectors, independent serializers (Transaction::read), property-based edge case enumeration, or Merkle tree structural properties. No test encrypts/signs with function A and decrypts/verifies with function A. Happy-path tx tests verify structure (spend/output count) via independent deserialization, not proof validity. This must be preserved — a contributor adding a 'roundtrip test' that uses the builder output as its own oracle proves nothing.
close_reason: Decision already documented in code. No code change needed.
